title: Avoid Mutable Instance Fields in Servlets
description: Avoiding mutable states in servlets is recommended to prevent unexpected behavior due to the servlet container creating only one instance of each servlet and attaching a dedicated thread to each incoming HTTP request.
recommendation: Refactor mutable instance fields into local variables or make them immutable by declaring them final.
impact: State changes to the instance caused by methods are not threadsafe, leading to unexpected behavior.

checks.message: Refactor mutable instance fields into local variables or make them immutable by declaring them final
